nasb.text: You shall also not uncover the nakedness of your mother’s sister or of your father’s sister, for such a one has made naked his blood relative; they will bear their guilt.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your mother’s sister or of your father’s sister, for that is to make naked one’s relative; they shall bear their iniquity.

cnv.text: 你不可揭露姨母，或是姑母的下體，因為這是揭露了骨肉之親的下體；這樣作的人要擔當自己的罪孽。

ccb.text: 不可与姨母或姑母乱伦，因为这是羞辱自己的亲人。二人要承担自己的罪。
